The problem

Your dog is not "the average"

A downloaded PDF doesn't know your dog only has 20 minutes a day, already masters "sit" but not "stay", or gets more excited around people than other dogs. Borix DogPath does.

Real dog profile

Breed, age, weight, sex, neutering status, and training history all go into every plan.

Specific problem

From leash pulling to separation anxiety: the plan targets the root cause, not a generic symptom.

Your real time

Whether you have 15 or 45 minutes a day, the plan works within what you can actually give.

Continuous progress

You report how your dog responded and next week adjusts — without erasing what already worked.

How it works

From questionnaire to plan in minutes

No complicated setup. No waiting. No generic plans.

01

Tell us about your dog

Profile, history, and the problem you want to solve. Under 5 minutes.

02

Get your 4-week plan

Diagnosis and daily exercises designed for your exact situation.

03

Train and track

Check off tasks and tell us how your dog responded each day.

04

The plan evolves

Future weeks adjust based on your real progress.

What's included

Everything you need to train seriously

AI-personalized plan

Generated from your dog's real data — not a template with the name swapped.

Daily tracking

Check off completed tasks and log how your dog responded in each session.

Weekly automatic adjustment

Each weekly review recalibrates future exercises based on your real progress.

Training library

Guides on puppies, leash walking, barking, anxiety, obedience, and socialization.

Installable app

Install it on your phone or PC like a native app — no app stores needed.

Progress Dashboard

See a visual weekly summary of your dog's improvement — streak tracking, completed sessions, and behavior trends.

The app

Everything in one place

Your plan, daily tracking, and progress always available from any device — phone, tablet, or PC.

FAQ

Everything you need to know

Does it work for any breed and age?

Yes. The plan is generated from your dog's specific profile — breed, age, weight, history, and main problem. From puppies to adult dogs.

Do I need prior training experience?

No. Each exercise includes clear steps, what to watch for, and the most common mistake to avoid. Designed for owners with no prior experience.

What if my dog doesn't progress as expected?

The system detects stagnation in the weekly review and adjusts exercises — reducing intensity or changing the approach without erasing what already worked.

How do I install the app on my phone?

Borix DogPath is a PWA — it installs directly from your browser in seconds, no App Store or Google Play needed.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes, no contracts or fine print. Cancel from your profile at any time.
